<!-- noesis:modules:start -->
<!-- Assembled by assemble.py — re-run it to update; edit outside this region. -->

### Inbox & Capture
- New files from outside land in inbox/ first; sort later (cadence: every Sunday).
- When something lands in inbox/, offer to sort it before it goes stale.

### Daily Notes
- Daily notes live at daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md. Start the day by reading today's note.
- Surface today's one big rock at the top of each daily note.
- Check inbox/ for unprocessed files when the day starts.

### Journal & Reflection
- Raw journal entries live in journal/ — never edit them; they are your unfiltered voice.
- Curated reflections live in reflections/ (write one weekly); read a recent one before writing to match voice.
- Never overwrite a raw journal entry with a cleaned-up version.
<!-- noesis:modules:end -->
